133:17384.name: As a core project of the Digital Innovation Team, the BI Portal delivers value through two dimensions: Data-Centric Framework Empowers business users to handle complex data logic and analytical tasks Experience-Led Revolution Restructures business workflows to revolutionize decision-making efficiency through intuitive data guidance My Contributions: Led design conceptualization for sales, e-commerce, and supply chain modules (wireframes/mockups) Managed vendor design teams to implement granular execution
133:17384.characters:
As a core project of the Digital Innovation Team, the BI Portal delivers value through two dimensions:
Data-Centric Framework 
Empowers business users to handle complex data logic and analytical tasks
Experience-Led Revolution
Restructures business workflows to revolutionize decision-making efficiency through intuitive data guidance
My Contributions:
Led design conceptualization for sales, e-commerce, and supply chain modules (wireframes/mockups)
Managed vendor design teams to implement granular execution
